name: construction contractors managing 5-15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-15 projects/month, the complexity of OSHA compliance reporting causes delays in project approvals. We automate report preparation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in preparing timely OSHA safety compliance reports.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in preparing timely OSHA safety compliance reports.
